items.title: ChatGPT Whether you understand the name or not.
items.title_zh: ChatGPT 不管你是否理解这个名字。
items.description: ChatGPT Whether you understand the name or not. It's here to stay. It's the past, the present, the future. Synonym with AI, soon synonym with agents. Much to build.
items.description_zh: ChatGPT 不管你是否理解这个名字。它会留在这里。这是过去、现在、未来。人工智能的同义词，很快就会成为代理的同义词。需要建设的东西还很多。

items.title: Tons of goodies for use of codex for day to day work.
items.title_zh: Codex 提供了大量用于日常工作的好东西。
items.description: Tons of goodies for use of codex for day to day work. If you are on a business plan you can now host and share websites, we launched vastly improved plugins and skills for broad roles and you can give feedback to your agent through visual…
items.description_zh: Codex 提供了大量用于日常工作的好东西。如果您正在制定商业计划，您现在可以托管和共享网站，我们针对广泛的角色推出了大大改进的插件和技能，您可以通过视觉向您的代理提供反馈……

items.title: Matt's guide is great but this line is pretty funny: "They're so lit up by being able to…
items.title_zh: 马特的指南很棒，但这句话很有趣：“他们因能够……而感到如此兴奋。
items.description: Matt's guide is great but this line is pretty funny: "They're so lit up by being able to build anything that they don't do anything else. Then they launch and there are no users." 😆 https://t.co/Cu6i8e8WWN https://t.co/zxK7w11ynW
items.description_zh: 马特的指南很棒，但这句话很有趣：“他们因为能够构建任何东西而感到如此兴奋，以至于他们不做任何其他事情。然后他们启动了，但没有用户。” 😆 https://t.co/Cu6i8e8WWN https://t.co/zxK7w11ynW

items.title: Have to give the Devin/Windsurf team flowers for staying disciplied through the ups and d…
items.title_zh: 必须向 Devin/Windsurf 团队献上鲜花，感谢他们在风风雨雨中保持纪律……
items.description: Have to give the Devin/Windsurf team flowers for staying disciplied through the ups and downs and keeping at it. I know many AI native builders who love Devin now. Will hopefully find some more time to try it myself. https://t.co/lTMAr2s8Yd

items.title: People are saying SaaS is not dead.
items.title_zh: 人们说 SaaS 并没有消亡。
items.description: People are saying SaaS is not dead. I think larger enterprise SaaS that can do multiple jobs are probably fine (e.g., Figma). But if you’re building a simple SaaS for a narrow use case, I think it's harder to monetize now because: 1. AI sk…
items.description_zh: 人们说 SaaS 并没有消亡。我认为可以完成多项工作的大型企业 SaaS 可能很好（例如 Figma）。但如果你正在为一个狭窄的用例构建一个简单的 SaaS，我认为现在很难盈利，因为： 1. AI sk…

items.title: Workflows are the biggest upgrade to Claude Code’s capabilities since skills and subagent…
items.title_zh: 工作流程是自技能和子代理以来 Claude Code 功能的最大升级……
items.description: Workflows are the biggest upgrade to Claude Code’s capabilities since skills and subagents. I dove deep into it with @sidbid to figure out best practices, examples and more. I’m particularly excited about the non-technical tasks it enables…
items.description_zh: 工作流程是自技能和子代理以来 Claude Code 功能的最大升级。我与@sidbid 一起深入研究它，以找出最佳实践、示例等。我对它能够完成的非技术任务感到特别兴奋……

items.title: Excited to partner with @Microsoft to enable everyone in the enterprise to build and depl…
items.title_zh: 很高兴与 @Microsoft 合作，让企业中的每个人都能够构建和部署……
items.description: Excited to partner with @Microsoft to enable everyone in the enterprise to build and deploy safe & secure Fabric data apps. This is possible thanks to Microsoft's new Rayfin SDK. https://t.co/sAEKkXYFfy
items.description_zh: 很高兴与 @Microsoft 合作，使企业中的每个人都能够构建和部署安全可靠的 Fabric 数据应用程序。这要归功于微软新的 Rayfin SDK。 https://t.co/sAEKkXYFfy
